시편 113:1.content: Praise Yah! Praise, you servants of Yahweh, praise Yahweh’s name.

시편 113:2.content: Blessed be Yahweh’s name, from this time forward and forever more.

시편 113:3.content: From the rising of the sun to its going down, Yahweh’s name is to be praised.

시편 113:4.content: Yahweh is high above all nations, his glory above the heavens.

시편 113:5.content: Who is like Yahweh, our God, who has his seat on high,

시편 113:6.content: Who stoops down to see in heaven and in the earth?

시편 113:7.content: He raises up the poor out of the dust. Lifts up the needy from the ash heap,

시편 113:8.content: that he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.

시편 113:9.content: He settles the barren woman in her home as a joyful mother of children. Praise Yah!
